member.name: T:Elastic.Apm.Azure.Storage.AzureBlobStorageDiagnosticListener
member.summary: Creates transactions and spans for Azure Blob Storage diagnostic events from Azure.Storage.Blobs

member.name: T:Elastic.Apm.Azure.Storage.AzureBlobStorageDiagnosticsSubscriber
member.summary: Subscribes to diagnostic source events from Azure.Storage.Blobs and Microsoft.Azure.Storage.Blob

member.name: T:Elastic.Apm.Azure.Storage.AzureFileShareStorageDiagnosticListener
member.summary: Creates transactions and spans for Azure File Share Storage diagnostic events from Azure.Storage.Files.Shares

member.name: T:Elastic.Apm.Azure.Storage.AzureFileShareStorageDiagnosticsSubscriber
member.summary: Subscribes to diagnostic source events from Azure.Storage.Files.Shares

member.name: T:Elastic.Apm.Azure.Storage.AzureQueueStorageDiagnosticListener
member.summary: Creates transactions and spans for Azure Queue Storage diagnostic events from Azure.Storage.Queues

member.name: T:Elastic.Apm.Azure.Storage.AzureQueueStorageDiagnosticListener.QueueUrl
member.summary: Working with a queue url to extract the queue name and address.

member.name: T:Elastic.Apm.Azure.Storage.AzureQueueStorageDiagnosticsSubscriber
member.summary: Subscribes to diagnostic source events from Azure.Storage.Queues

member.name: T:Elastic.Apm.Azure.Storage.MicrosoftAzureBlobStorageTracer
member.summary: Creates HTTP spans wth Azure Blob storage details from Microsoft.Azure.Storage.Blob
